name: Recall - Silent Study Memory Vault
description: A privacy-first study extension that captures educational sessions, builds a local knowledge graph, and generates revision-ready study passports.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com https://*.googleapis.com https://openrouter.ai;
